hero.title: A Casa da Alquimia
hero.subtitle: A Place For Those Who Want To Know Themselves

about.titleLine1: A Place For Those Who Want To
about.lead: We were born from a deep desire to create a space of silence and inner stillness — so that self-knowledge becomes possible as a way of life.
about.body: Founded by spiritual seekers with decades of experience working with plant medicines, our community is dedicated to providing a safe space for individual transformations to unfold in their full potential. We do this through tools like meditation, introspective therapies, nature connection practices, and through ayahuasca ceremonies.

rituals.title: Our alchemies in motion
rituals.subtitle: Transformative experiences guided by experienced facilitators
rituals.ctaBody: All rituals are led by experienced facilitators, in a suitable environment, with all the preparation needed for a safe and transformative experience.

items.title: Forest medicine ceremonies
items.description: Rituals that seek introspection through meditation and the expansion of consciousness. They can take place at the fire circle or in the hall. They also include calls and uplifting songs.
details: Frequency: contact us to check our calendar

items.title: Medicine preparation (feitio)
items.description: A sacred moment in which participants experience the entire traditional process of preparing and purifying the medicine: from harvesting to bottling.

items.title: Guided meditations
items.description: A daily moment of introspection and silence as a way of internalizing the day-to-day routine and opening the inner channel for self-knowledge and meditation.

items.title: Casulo Therapy
items.description: A ritual of reconnection and self-replenishment in the form of a cocoon made of cooked herbs, where the participant enters a meditative state.
details: Includes: harvesting and preparing the herbs, cooking, and moments of silence and deepening in the cocoon

items.title: Temazcal (sweat lodge)
items.description: A sweat lodge ritual originating from the traditional peoples of Central America, aimed at purifying body and spirit through contact with the elements of nature (earth, air, fire, and water).
details: Includes: sweat lodge, meditation, and herbal bath

items.title: Permaculture and natural building experience
items.description: Those who actively participate in A Casa da Alquimia have the opportunity to experience permaculture and natural building in collective knowledge-sharing processes.

memorias.title: Memories
photos: Afternoon at A Casa da Alquimia

social.subtitle: Follow us on Instagram and stay connected to our ceremonies, retreats, and moments along the path

testimonials.title: What the travellers say
testimonials.subtitle: Words from those living the transformation

items.quote: Being here is the feeling of completeness from a journey of seeking I've already lived. It's the understanding that the search is within, and that in silence I find myself again. Here, we live in practice the entire journey — outward and inward: from planting, composting the earth, natural building, cultivation techniques and preparing plant medicines over the fire of the pots and the personal inner fire of each one. And all of this is only possible here with meditation and the activation of presence in daily activities, which lead to the understanding and fulfillment of the path inward — and an inner alchemy that forges and opens space for this being to flourish.
items.author: Paulo Rios

items.quote: A Casa da Alquimia is the reminder that I am this space of personal self-transformation. It is with this inner fire that each person lives this in individual practice and among friends on the path, in this inner and outer union. And it is through our friends on the path that we find the heart of light — our own and each other's.
items.author: Ananda

items.quote: For me, A Casa da Alquimia has a unique purpose of inner investigation and meeting oneself. Living this through the exchange and sharing of everyday life. Here I experience meditation, silence, and connection.
items.author: Sadgati

items.quote: When I arrived at A Casa da Alquimia, I felt how much I had missed myself. Only when I became deeply quiet did I remember the size of my being and of my love. This place brings about deep reunions and moments of consciousness expansion I had never experienced before. These are rare and precious moments in a lifetime of spiritual seeking.
items.author: Bárbara Rocha

items.quote: A Casa da Alquimia allowed me — like nowhere else in recent years — to take a firm step back into my spiritual path. I never imagined how significant that step would be, or how important this House would become to me. A great reference, fertile ground, a family of the heart — a place where I know, even as I sail other waters, this will always be my safe harbor.
items.author: Mari Sarmento

items.quote: I lived a transformative experience at the Casulo retreat: strength, magic, and warmth that brought calm, trust, and the feeling that something very special is (re)born.
items.author: Thais Mesquita

items.quote: This is a safe space I had never found before, and I'm deeply glad to have discovered it. Within a network of meditators committed to the expansion of love and self-observation, I can also dive into my own investigation. The result in my practical life is simply more patience, more presence, and a version of me that contributes more to everyone around me.
items.author: Angel Ferreira

sections.title: 1. Who We Are
sections.content:
A Casa da Alquimia is a sacred space dedicated to the expansion of consciousness, self-knowledge, and ancestral healing practices. We operate at two physical locations in Cavalcante, Goiás, Brazil, and communicate with our community through our website and social media.

For the purposes of this policy, the data controller is A Casa da Alquimia, which can be reached at casadaalquimia@gmail.com.

sections.title: 2. Data We Collect
sections.content:
We collect only the data strictly necessary to maintain our relationship with the community:

**Data you provide voluntarily:**
- Name and email address when filling out contact forms or registering for retreats and activities;
- Phone number / WhatsApp when you start a conversation with us;
- Messages and content sent through forms or communication channels.

**Automatically collected data:**
- Technical access information (IP address, browser type, pages visited, and browsing time), collected by traffic analysis tools for statistical purposes.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
4. Legal Basis for Processing
5. Data Sharing
6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
7. Third-Party Services
8. Data Retention
sections.content: We keep your data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. Registration data for activities and events is retained while the relationship is active and for up to 5 years after its end, for legal compliance. Contact data and communication lists are retained until you request deletion.

sections.title: 9. Your Rights (LGPD)
10. Data Security
sections.content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or improper disclosure. However, no internet data transmission is completely secure. If you identify any vulnerability or incident related to your data, please contact us immediately.

sections.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: This policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. The most recent version will always be available on this page, with the date of the last update shown in the footer. We recommend reviewing this document periodically.

sections.title: 12. Contact and Data Officer
sections.content:
For questions, requests, or exercise of your rights under this policy, contact us:

**Casa da Alquimia**
Email: casadaalquimia@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +55 (62) 99653-8902

Espaço Coração de Luz — Rua Cel José Paulino da Silva, Centro, Cavalcante, Goiás
Casa da Alquimia — Estrada da Usina, Fazenda Miraflores, Cavalcante, Goiás
